title: EllipseMinorDiam Property
description: Specifies length of the minor axis of the ellipse which is the inspection base line of ArcInspector.
notes:
EllipseMinorDiam is used to specify length of the ellipse's minor axis when the ellipse is specified as a base line used by ArcInspector.

See Also: EllipseMinorDiam Property
